session_focus: Remove redundant panels, routes, and widgets when they duplicate better repo-backed surfaces, but keep the underlying state APIs if they still serve the engine.
user_directives: Remove redundant panels, routes, and widgets when they duplicate better repo-backed surfaces, but keep the underlying state APIs if they still serve the engine.
assistant_responses: Retired redundant frontend surfaces while preserving canonical APIs and state artifacts that still support repo truth, loop verification, and training data collection.
training_value: Redundancy in the interface is not the same as redundancy in the state engine.
The conversation kept distinguishing between dead GUI duplication and backend truth that should remain reusable.
